title: Netify Flow Purge Telemetry
description: JSON Schema for Netify Agent v5 flow purge telemetry.

interface.description: Interface name associated with the purged flow.

internal.description: Indicates whether the flow is internal to the local network context.

reason.description: Purge reason reported by the engine.

flow.description: Container for final per-flow statistics at purge time.

detection_packets.description: Number of packets used for application/protocol detection.

digest_prev.description: List of previous digest identifiers associated with the flow.

last_seen_at.description: Timestamp in Unix epoch milliseconds when the flow was last observed.

local_bytes.description: Bytes sent from the local endpoint.

local_packets.description: Packets sent from the local endpoint.

local_rate.description: Final local transmit rate for the flow.

other_bytes.description: Bytes sent from the remote endpoint.

other_packets.description: Packets sent from the remote endpoint.

other_rate.description: Final remote transmit rate for the flow.

tcp.description: TCP health and error counters for TCP flows.

resets.description: Count of observed TCP reset packets for the flow.

retrans.description: Count of observed TCP retransmissions for the flow.

seq_errors.description: Count of TCP sequence anomalies for the flow.

total_bytes.description: Total bytes seen for the flow in both directions.

total_packets.description: Total packets seen for the flow in both directions.
